features.name: short_circuit_and_with_side_effect
features.description: Code should include a logical AND (&&) operator where the right-hand operand has a side effect such as increment, decrement, or function call with side effects

features.name: short_circuit_or_with_side_effect
features.description: Code should include a logical OR (||) operator where the right-hand operand has a side effect such as increment, decrement, or function call with side effects
